extra.reason: Fixed: tightened Basic Auth URL regex in vault-scan from '://[^[:space:]]+:[^[:space:]]+@' to '://[^@/:[:space:]]+:[^@/:[:space:]]+@[^/:[:space:]]' — requires actual user:pass@host format, no longer matches query params with @ like Google Fonts URLs

Fixed: search now recurses nested mailboxes (Gmail [Gmail]/All Mail, etc.) via jsCollectAllMailboxes helper with Message-ID dedup; per-mailbox scan cap raised 200→500; search timeout 60s→90s; mail show readMessage timeout 10s→45s. 1101 tests pass.

Fixed in fe45558: nested-mailbox fallback + pre-touch + JXA 'in:' key + mimeType() guard + source() for IMAP binaries. Verified against the reported repro (matthewwagner038@gmail.com||Important||6442 — 198k PDF saved). Regression tests added in JXAScriptBuilderTests.

Extracted shared ScriptRunner from NotesBridge/MailBridge; adds open -gja retry once on timeout when appName is provided. Scope narrowed to Notes+Mail (Calendar/Reminders/Contacts use EventKit/CNContactStore, no host app dep). 5 ScriptRunner tests + existing 38 Notes/Mail tests pass. Committed 4609088.

Added --preview N flag to mail list (CLI + mail_list MCP tool). bodyPreview is opt-in (script unchanged when flag absent); when set, msg.content() triggers IMAP fetch, truncated with ellipsis at min(N, 4000). Timeout bumps to 60s with preview on. MailMessage.bodyPreview added as encodeIfPresent (back-compatible). Committed 4bebb0b.
Shipped mail activity subcommand + MCP tool. Combined INBOX+Sent scan with body preview, dedup by messageId, alias resolution with collectAllMailboxes fallback. 25 new tests, all 1149 tests passing.

Extracted shared ScriptRunner from NotesBridge/MailBridge; adds open -gja retry once on timeout when appName is provided. Scope narrowed to Notes+Mail (Calendar/Reminders/Contacts use EventKit/CNContactStore, no host app dep). 5 ScriptRunner tests + existing 38 Notes/Mail tests pass. Committed 4609088 (squash-merged in 0d827e0).

Added --preview N flag to mail list (CLI + mail_list MCP tool). bodyPreview is opt-in (script unchanged when flag absent); when set, msg.content() triggers IMAP fetch, truncated with ellipsis at min(N, 4000). Timeout bumps to 60s with preview on. MailMessage.bodyPreview added as encodeIfPresent (back-compatible). Committed 4bebb0b (squash-merged in 0d827e0).

Shipped mail activity subcommand + MCP tool. Combined INBOX+Sent scan with body preview, dedup by messageId, alias resolution with collectAllMailboxes fallback. 25 new tests, all 1149 tests passing. Committed aee4e33+55fda62 (squash-merged in 0d827e0).
CLAUDE.md split into progressive-disclosure gotchas (295->191 lines); release procedure shipped as docs/skills/release/SKILL.md with make link-skills target; docs/README.md index added
Shipped: pippin actions extract command (mail + notes commitment extraction). All 1235 tests pass.
Bumped to Swift 6.3 (6.3.1 verified locally). 1240 tests pass via DEVELOPER_DIR=Xcode.app. ci.yml now pins Xcode via setup-xcode@v1 latest-stable.

Envelope v1 shipped on b615d58. All 20 commands wrapping in {v,status,duration_ms,data|error}; 7 new envelope tests + 2 updated integration tests (1247 total green); consumer docs migrated in-repo (mcp-server.md, CLAUDE.md) and out-of-repo (morning-briefing SKILL.md, Talia TOOLS.md). Unblocks 7gz/gb3/7lj/2km.
open/snapshot now support --retry / --expect-field / --retry-delay-ms; fetch tracked separately as pippin-j4c

Pagination module shipped (Cursor/Page/PaginationOptions/Pagination helpers); integrated into mail list (native pushdown), memos list (in-memory), reminders list (in-memory), calendar events (in-memory). Remaining 4 commands tracked as follow-up.

pippin batch + MCP batch tool shipped: BatchCommand reads JSON array via stdin / --input / --entries; runs each entry as child via MCPServerRuntime.runChild with --concurrency-bounded withTaskGroup; returns enveloped array of per-item envelopes. MCP 'batch' tool registered (32 tools total). docs/mcp-server.md updated. Unblocks pippin-9zy (do).
